So I've shown you all of those things but what we're going to do in this next level week is I'm going to show you how to take your consulting business really from a done-for-you or an advising business to an actual systemised products business. So if you remember from week one we discussed something called the evolution of a consultant and we discussed the evolutionary stages that a consultant goes through as they evolve and really start working their way up. So most consultants start out as a generalist consultant and that's a consultant who helps anyone with anything for any price and they'll pretty much do anything. They're like a glorified human body for hire and that's where most people start. There's nothing wrong with starting there provided that you evolve pretty quick. Then the next stage of evolution is a niche consultant so that's a consultant who is doing done for you but they now have a niche and it's really important to cut your teeth and get your start doing done for you and that's what most of you will be doing in this consulting accelerator program. ## [03:00 - 06:02]

Skype and we're advising them in a one-on-one setting. That's what we've covered mostly in the consulting accelerator program but there's another level to this. There's another level which is just totally different to everything which we've discussed here and that's when we really productise everything that we do and we turn a service into a product and it's something which I've learned to do from my own journey and my own experience and it's something that I've developed mastery in and turned into one of my secret weapons. When I talk about productising your offer or productising your business I mean looking at your business as a done-for-you business or a one-on-one advising or consulting business and we look at everything that's going on there and that really what's going on there is a you know in the flesh sort of transaction. You're either delivering the services yourself or you're doing the work yourself and it's very manual and it's very time-consuming and it's very like you know it's manual labour sort of stuff right and that's really traditional consulting and what you'll realise is that there's a level and there's a ceiling to where this kind of meets its limits. You can only do done-for-you services to a certain point. It doesn't matter like how many people you hire it doesn't matter how good you get at it. Any done-for-you business is going to reach its limit and they typically reach this limit pretty quickly and it will hit a ceiling and it doesn't matter what you do you won't be able to get past that ceiling and also if you're doing one-on-one consulting and talking to your clients in a one-on-one setting you're also going to come and bump up against that ceiling you're going to hit a limit and the only way to really get out of that limit zone and really transcend your level of play is by adopting a new model and really evolving into a new level and that next level is what I'm going to explain and educate you on in this week of the program. So I'm going to explain how to take your business from a done-for-you business or a one-on-one service delivery business where you're consulting people on the phone in a one-on-one setting. I'm going to tell you how to take that and really turn it into a productised business where we basically take the offline dynamics and we turn it into an online program like the Consulting Accelerator and when you learn how to do that when you learn how to take your business from done-for-you to a product and to an online program you'll learn how to really make a huge jump in your income and in the size and scale of your consulting business. In my consulting business I only really got to about $200,000 a month when I was doing done-for-you services and that was with a huge amount of overhead and staff and a lot of people don't want that complexity and it really is your pain having all of that overhead and all of those staff.
